name: ERPORDLOCK
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[ERPORDLOCK] ON [dbo].[STOKFISLERI]
FOR INSERT, DELETE, UPDATE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON
DECLARE @AKTIF			INT
DECLARE @SB_REF			INT
DECLARE @PB_REF			INT
DECLARE @DAKTIF			INT
DECLARE @DSB_REF			INT
DECLARE @DPB_REF			INT
SELECT 
@AKTIF					= R.AKTIF ,
@SB_REF					= R.SB_REF ,
@PB_REF					= R.PB_REF
FROM INSERTED R
SELECT 
@DAKTIF					= D.AKTIF ,
@DSB_REF				= D.SB_REF ,
@DPB_REF				= D.PB_REF
FROM DELETED D

DECLARE @ENT_SRC AS INT
DECLARE @ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_SAL AS INT
DECLARE @ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_PUR AS INT
DECLARE @L_DB AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @L_FR AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @L_DN AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @LSERVER AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @LSERVERAT AS NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @Str NVARCHAR(1000)
DECLARE @StrX	nvarchar(200),@ParmX nvarchar(20),@EXTERNAL_DB	NVARCHAR(200)
DECLARE @DB_EXIST AS INT
DECLARE @ENT_REF INT
DECLARE @DENT_REF INT
DECLARE @SIPARIS_TURU INT
DECLARE @DSIPARIS_TURU INT

IF (ISNULL(@DPB_REF,0)=0 AND ISNULL(@DSB_REF,0)>0 ) OR (ISNULL(@PB_REF,0)=0 AND ISNULL(@SB_REF,0)>0 )
BEGIN
	SET @LSERVER=''
	SET @LSERVERAT=''
	SELECT TOP 1 @ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_SAL=ISNULL(ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_SAL,0),@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_PUR=ISNULL(ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_PUR,0),@ENT_SRC=ISNULL(ENT_SRC,0) , @L_DB=LOGO_VERITABANI,@L_FR=LOGO_FIRMA,@L_DN=LOGO_DONEM,@LSERVER=LINKEDSERVER from GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK) 
	IF @ENT_SRC=1 AND (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_SAL=1 OR @ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_PUR=1)
	BEGIN
		IF LEN(@LSERVER)>0 SET @LSERVERAT=' AT ['+@LSERVER+']' 
		IF LEN(@LSERVER)>0 SET @LSERVER='['+@LSERVER+'].' 
		SELECT @ENT_REF=ENT_REF,@SIPARIS_TURU=SIPARIS_TURU FROM SIPARISFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF =@SB_REF
		SELECT @DENT_REF=ENT_REF,@DSIPARIS_TURU=SIPARIS_TURU FROM SIPARISFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF =@DSB_REF
		IF @ENT_REF>0 OR @DENT_REF>0
		BEGIN
			IF (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_SAL=1 AND(@SIPARIS_TURU=1 OR @DSIPARIS_TURU=1)) OR (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_PUR=1 AND(@SIPARIS_TURU=2 OR @DSIPARIS_TURU=2))
			BEGIN

				SET @StrX='SELECT @R=COUNT(*) FROM '+@LSERVER+'master.sys.databases WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE name ='''+@L_DB+''' '
				SET @ParmX='@R INT output'
				EXEC sp_executesql @StrX , @ParmX ,@DB_EXIST OUT
				IF @DB_EXIST>0 
				BEGIN
					
					SET @StrX='SELECT @R=DBNAME FROM '+@LSERVER+@L_DB+'.dbo.L_CAPIFIRM WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE NR='+@L_FR
					SET @ParmX='@R NVARCHAR(200) output'
					EXEC sp_executesql @StrX , @ParmX ,@EXTERNAL_DB OUT
					IF ISNULL(@EXTERNAL_DB,'')='' SET @EXTERNAL_DB=@L_DB
 					
					IF ISNULL(@DPB_REF,0)=0 AND ISNULL(@DSB_REF,0)>0 AND @DAKTIF=1 AND ( (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_SAL=1 AND @DSIPARIS_TURU=1) OR (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_PUR=1 AND @DSIPARIS_TURU=2) )
					BEGIN
						IF ISNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOKFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF =@DSB_REF AND AKTIF=1),0)=0
						BEGIN
							SET @StrX='EXEC ('' UPDATE '+@EXTERNAL_DB+'.dbo.LG_'+@L_FR+'_'+@L_DN+'_ORFICHE SET APPROVE=0 WHERE APPROVE=1 AND LOGICALREF ='+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@DENT_REF)+' '')'+@LSERVERAT
							EXEC sp_executesql @StrX
						END
					END
					
					IF ISNULL(@PB_REF,0)=0 AND ISNULL(@SB_REF,0)>0 AND @AKTIF=1 AND ( (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_SAL=1 AND @SIPARIS_TURU=1) OR (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_PUR=1 AND @SIPARIS_TURU=2) )
					BEGIN
							SET @StrX='EXEC ('' UPDATE '+@EXTERNAL_DB+'.dbo.LG_'+@L_FR+'_'+@L_DN+'_ORFICHE SET APPROVE=1 WHERE APPROVE=0 AND LOGICALREF ='+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@ENT_REF)+' '')'+@LSERVERAT
							EXEC sp_executesql @StrX
					END
					
					IF ISNULL(@PB_REF,0)=0 AND ISNULL(@SB_REF,0)>0 AND @AKTIF=0 AND ( (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_SAL=1 AND @SIPARIS_TURU=1) OR (@ENT_ORDLOCK_ERP_OPN_SLP_PUR=1 AND @SIPARIS_TURU=2) )
					BEGIN
						IF ISNULL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOKFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF =@SB_REF AND AKTIF=1),0)=0
						BEGIN
							SET @StrX='EXEC ('' UPDATE '+@EXTERNAL_DB+'.dbo.LG_'+@L_FR+'_'+@L_DN+'_ORFICHE SET APPROVE=0 WHERE APPROVE=1 AND LOGICALREF ='+CONVERT(NVARCHAR,@ENT_REF)+' '')'+@LSERVERAT
							EXEC sp_executesql @StrX
						END
					END

				END

			END
		END
	END
END
